text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: RaaS: Replay-as-a-Service · 消除 Tail Latency

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: SIGMOD 2026 · 存储计算分离场景下 Replay 请求到热副本 · 消除日志链长度差异导致的 Tail Latency

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 问题: 日志链长度差异 → Tail Latency

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ Compute Node A: 本地日志链长 (缓存热) → 快 (ms)

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ Compute Node B: 日志链短 (缓存冷) → 慢 (s)

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ Root Cause: 存储计算分离 → 无数据亲和性

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: └ 传统解法: Caching / Preloading → 治标不治本

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: RaaS 解决方案

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ Replay Request 到热副本 (缓存节点)

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ 热节点: 本地重放 log → 快路径响应

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ ✓ 消除日志链长度带来的缓存依赖

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: └ ✓ 利用已有热副本 · 零额外开销

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: RaaS 架构

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: Client

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: Node B (冷: 日志链短)

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: Replay Request → 热副本

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: Node A (热: 日志链长)

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 响应: 12ms ✅

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 12ms → Client

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 核心洞察: 在存储计算分离架构下, Replay 比 Caching/Preloading 更具确定性地消除 Tail Latency
